What We Do

Engineering & Consultancy Services

Delivering technical excellence across five core service areas — from initial design through construction support, environmental management, and logistics.

Engineering & Consultancy

Focused technical guidance, innovative solutions, and precise support from planning through execution.

Design Management

Disciplined design oversight ensuring efficiency, compliance, and consistently high-quality outcomes.

Construction Support

Effective planning, coordination, and on-site oversight to deliver reliable, on-time results.

Environment Services

Sustainable development, environmental assessments, and community-focused strategies.

Transport & Logistics

Optimizing mobility, material flow, and operational planning for safe, cost-effective project delivery.

Azmi A. Abousaleh, P.E.
Principal Engineer
M.M.E · Licensed P.E., State of Texas

As a Professional Engineer in the State of Texas, Azmi has 45 years of experience in the oil & gas field. His competencies include management, supervision, mechanical, piping, pipeline, electrical & instrumentation engineering in the oil and gas and petrochemical industries — including plant piping, cross-country pipelines, mechanical and electrical equipment, pumps, valves, pressure vessels, heat exchangers, tanks, instrumentation, leak detection, metering stations, surge relief and drag reducing agent skids. Design and analysis of pipelines (Crude Oil/Gas/NGL), flowlines, trunklines, bulk plants, water/crude/gas wells, chilled water systems, water treatment facilities, irrigation distribution systems, pump stations, tank farm facilities, loading terminals, and other refinery and petrochemical facilities.

Expertise includes project management, project control, cost control, scheduling, reporting, procurement and supervision of various contracts including EPC (Engineering-Procurement-Construction), LSTK (Lump Sum Turnkey), and LSPB (Lump Sum Procure & Build) projects.

Hussam Kassab
Principal Engineer & Manager
BSc. Civil Engineering · PMP® · NFPA-CFPS

Over 35 years of engineering, design, consultancy, engineering support and management experience. Extensive experience in multi-discipline technical environments related to Oil & Gas and Infrastructure — including Petrochemicals, Desalination, Bridges/Causeways, Railways, Terminals, Ports & Berths, and Marine Structures.

Proven experience in design concepts development, master planning, detailed engineering, statutory reviews and approvals, and environmental issues. Main systems/equipment sizing and logistics considerations. Preparation of technical studies, engineering design, concepts development, front-end engineering and RFP preparations for PPP transactions as technical advisor and major EPC projects.

Mohamed Alomar
Electrical Engineer & Manager
B.S. Electrical Engineering

A highly professional Electrical Engineer and Manager with over 25 years of experience and proven construction management expertise. Mohamed has managed large-scale complex projects from budgeting, scheduling, staffing and quality assurance perspectives.

Expertise covers design of 230kV, 115kV & 69kV switchyard and substations, overhead transmission and 13.8kV distribution lines, electrical power distribution systems, power system protection, technical load evaluation, and equipment sizing. Power System Analysis using ETAP PowerStation Software.

Samir Rania
Sr. Architectural Manager
Post Graduate Degree in Architecture, Versailles, France

Over 45 years of experience in design and leading/managing multidisciplinary architectural teams across a wide range of master planning and architectural projects. Expertise in enhancing technical aspects for standard and LEED requirements. Planning, programming and design of functional and aesthetic solutions for urban developments and buildings across various occupancies — including Industrial Buildings, Houses, Dwellings, Offices, Hotels, Hospitals, Medium-Rise and High-Rise Buildings.

Samir has been involved in the strategic planning, design and delivery, and stakeholder coordination for many mega projects in Saudi Arabia, Canada, and France. He has worked with international firms including WSP, Khateeb & Alami, and DG Jones.

Ahmad Alkhateeb
BIM Design Manager
BSc. Interior Architecture, Damascus University

Ahmed is the lead manager of the BIM design team with 16 years of experience managing digital 3D BIM design throughout the full project design cycle. He reinforces BIM standards while leading a technical team of experts, and leverages strong communication skills to optimize collaboration between architects, engineers, contractors, and owner representatives.

Ahmed has overseen the production of many successful BIM models delivering high-quality, clash-free results. He is highly versatile in Autodesk Revit and BIM 360, and has conducted training workshops for new users and entry-level BIM modelers.

Reem Hayder
Process Engineer
MSc. Chemical Engineering · BSc. Chemical Engineering

Experience in preparation of key process deliverables including P&IDs, PFDs and piping main arrangements. Design and engineering of Water Treatment systems, Oil & Gas facilities, and utilities systems. Coordination with Piping/Mechanical, Instrumentation and Electrical design teams.

Knowledge of preparation of project documents, Bills of Quantities (BOQs), and specifications.

Raghid Abdelsamad
Principal Engineer – Structural
BS Civil Engineering

Raghid brings 17 years of extensive background in structural design, specializing in steel structures. He thrives on complex and challenging design problems — his strong academic foundation and technical depth have made him the go-to engineer for the most demanding structural challenges.

Raghid commands a full suite of structural software including Autodesk Revit, SkyCiv, ETABS/SAP2000, and Ansys for simulation and modeling work.

Jose Togado
Sr. Mechanical Engineer
BSc. Mechanical Engineering – Electronics Major

Over 25 years of combined experience in design, engineering and construction — covering management, execution, quality assurance, design familiarization and related engineering standards for major buildings, facilities and plants. Expertise includes Utilities Systems (HVAC, Fire Protection, Water Systems).

Extensive experience in the operation and maintenance of Steam Generators with their auxiliaries and other industrial equipment and machinery for a sugar manufacturing plant, as well as District Cooling Facilities.

Portfolio

Projects Experience

Urban Development

Tharwat Town Marine Works

 Saudi Arabia

Marine reclamation works and shore protection design for 4,400,000 m² land development. Preparation of bid package, contract documents, and technical support during execution (2016–2018).

01 / 11
Urban Development

Concept Master Plan — New Island KFCA

 King Fahd Causeway Authority, KSA

Preparation and design of Concept Master Plan for development of the Saudi Side new Island as a commercial and entertainment hub for the King Fahd Causeway Authority.

02 / 11
Architectural & Building

King Salman Reservation — Tubaiq

 Saudi Arabia

Preparation of Master Plan and Architectural design concept and theme park for a prestigious project including HQ building and facilities for King Salman Reservation.

03 / 11
Structural & Building

Oxagon Terminal Warehouse — NEOM

 Saudi Arabia

Structural modeling for a highly technical warehouse design measuring 500m × 450m × 85m — one of the largest structural modeling projects in the region.

04 / 11
MEP / Infrastructure

Pipe Stress Analysis & Vibration Model

 Jubail, Saudi Arabia

Pipe stress analysis by CAESAR-II for several pipelines and process equipment installations. 3D modeling of piping and equipment arrangements for various plant and pipeline projects.

05 / 11
MEP / Infrastructure

QGWP Detailed Piping Design

 Qatar (with Veolia ME)

Detailed design of piping system, stress analysis, structural modeling, fabrication drawings including isometrics, equipment skids, pipe supports, foundations, and platform design.

06 / 11
Urban Development

Cornish Al-Khobar Development Marine Works

 Al-Khobar, Saudi Arabia

Design and reclamation, shore protection and ground improvement for 3,000,000 m² of new development. Comprehensive infrastructure works along the Al-Khobar corniche.

07 / 11
Architectural & Building

Building Project Cost Engineering

 Mekkah, Saudi Arabia

Preparation of BOQs, material specifications, and tender design support for a major building complex in Mekkah with extensive MEP systems. Review and development of architectural finishing drawings, fire and life safety plans.

08 / 11
Structural & Assessment

Structural Assessment — STC Sites

 Saudi Arabia

Structural assessment for up to 40 exchange buildings for STC including concrete repairs, structural strengthening measures, and comprehensive design supervision.

09 / 11
Structural & Building

Riyadh International Convention & Exhibition Center

 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia

Structural design and connection design, shop drawing preparation, and 3D Tekla model development for the premium convention and exhibition hospitality building.

10 / 11
Design & Documentation

Shop & Fabrication Drawings

 Various Locations

Comprehensive shop and fabrication drawing packages covering structural steel, MEP systems, equipment skids, and detailed fabrication specifications across multiple projects.

11 / 11
